summary: Frontend testing of Rudralife landing page. All key features verified: hero section with new mala-on-silk banner, panel experts with circular gold-bordered portrait frames and flip animation, admin login.

issues: 'Empower Yourself' is split across two lines - selector 'text=Empower Yourself' fails but visual rendering is correct. This is cosmetic only.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: hero banner (mala on dark silk), 5 expert flip cards with circular portraits (all faces visible), flip animation working on hover, Get Free Recommendation button navigates to /recommendation, admin login works with admin@rudralife.com / Rudralife@2024.
